data.summary: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for live schedule, policy, and dependency checks.
data.assessment: The evidence provided confirms that the system supports validation against live schedules, policies, permissions, and dependencies through the dry-run functionality. The linked use case demonstrates that an agent can preview the consequences of rescheduling appointments, identifying which bookings can be moved cleanly and which require further action, thus fulfilling the requirement. This aligns with the expected result of capturing confirmation of requirement coverage, as evidenced by the detailed responses in the dry-run output.
